commands: if [ -f backend/requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; else pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; fi && gunicorn server:app -k uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker --workers ${WORKERS:-2} --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --timeout 120 --max-requests 1000 --max-requests-jitter 100 --access-logfile - --error-logfile -
